title: Archaic Chocolatier's guide to well brewed Coffee
description: An Add-On for Create that helps with all your drinking problems
body:
Basically this addon adds three new items to the game plus one block
- Hot Chocolate
- Grape Juice
- Glow Juice
these items can be aged for bonus/stronger effects
this is done via the Aging Vat

![Recipe for Aging Vat 8 iron around a barrel in a crafting table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d02f32b378bf63a2f53916a7b4007f37c33ca218.png)

Know issues
Hoppers do not work correctly with the aging Vat
they can pull hot chocolate from the top slot as well as the bottom, a solution is to just use a smart chute

You can put this in a modpack
you can make a fork so long as you declare it's a fork
you MAY NOT repost it anywhere
